final_answer: ALLOW. Platform operations may activate telemetry service. CAL-ACR-022 exactly covers DG-41B production telemetry units at Site 18-P for release condition RC-7, completed before activation ACT-ACR-2026-8022. The shared-prefix warning in NOTE-ACR-022 is neutralized because CAL-ACR-022 explicitly identifies production units, not lab units. All four policy-required boundary fields (device group, site, release condition, timing) match exactly. No blockers remain.
warning_or_prelim_artifact_handling: NOTE-ACR-022 (shared-prefix warning) does not block because CAL-ACR-022 explicitly specifies production units at Site 18-P, distinguishing from lab units at Site 18-L. The source record specificity overrides the prefix warning.
